features: 2M 2 Way Extension Cords: 13A/250V~, Max load 3120W, White2M 2 Way Extension Cords: 13A/250V~, Max load 3120W, White

Multi-Function: This 13A extension lead with total power supply up to 3120W, enables you to power up 2 appliances simultaneously. Ideal for using in home, offices, entertainment centers and other areas where multiple devices need to be connected.

Space-saving Design: The compact and lightweight design will not occupy much space and 1 metre length cable is long enough to reach your powered devices. Ideal for charging multiple appliances at the same time.
High Quality: The heavy duty power extension lead is non-rewirable plug and 3*1.25mm² standard copper wire design to ensure your safety. Q
What You Get: 2 Way 2M extension lead and our friendly customer service. Any questions about the item, please feel free to contact us at any time and we will reply in 24 hours.
description: Product Description ExtraStar which is renowned for its excellent quality and good value, was founded in 1992 and headquartered in Spain. Load: 3120W Wall-mounted: No Copper Wire: H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² ExtraStar 2 Way Double Sockets Power Mains Extension Lead with Extended Cable Higher Quality Standard Power Cord ExtraStar is constantly looking for safe and efficient products for improving user experience and creating a new generation of technology and products that truly meet the needs of hundreds of families. Keep packaging bag away from children. Do not use in wet conditions. Do not exceed total maximum load. Do not wire directly to the mains. Fully extend before use. Key Features High Grand Material 3*1.25mm²#13A copper fused cable will not get soften and deformation easily. Anti-fire material using higher quality standard power cord, high temperature resistant and flame retardant provide effective fire protection to eliminate hidden dangers. Security Shutter 2 way sockets can bring less heat and power resistance, and protect kids from unexpected electric shock. Anti-thunder protection ensure more safety for household electric appliances, offering an extra safety and a peaceful mind while charging. Multiple Sockets Equipped with 2 protected AC power outlets and 3-Line protection, the extension lead can power two devices simultaneously. Compact family-sized shape fits nicely over your desk in your home or office, creating perfect charging experience for you.
